easy.subject: Can't log into my account
easy.description: I forgot my password and the reset email isn't arriving. I've waited 30 minutes.

easy.subject: How do I cancel my order?
easy.description: I just placed an order 20 minutes ago and want to cancel it. Is that possible?

easy.subject: What payment methods do you accept?
easy.description: I want to pay using UPI but not sure if you accept it.

easy.subject: Is my product still under warranty?
easy.description: I bought a laptop stand 8 months ago and it stopped working. Is it still covered?

easy.subject: How do I delete my account?
easy.description: I want to delete my account permanently. Can you tell me how?

easy.subject: I see a duplicate charge on my card
easy.description: I was charged twice for the same order yesterday. Please help.

medium.subject: Haven't received my order
medium.description: It's been 2 weeks and my order still hasn't arrived. This is ridiculous.

medium.subject: Order tracking not updating
medium.description: My tracking page hasn't updated in 5 days. Don't know where my package is.

medium.subject: Wrong item delivered
medium.description: I ordered a USB Hub but received a completely different product. This is unacceptable.

medium.subject: My order is showing delivered but I never got it
medium.description: The tracking says delivered 3 days ago but nothing arrived at my address.

medium.subject: Need to change delivery address
medium.description: I placed an order yesterday but need to change the delivery address. Is it too late?

hard.subject: DEMAND REFUND NOW - Charged twice for broken item!!!
hard.description: I was charged TWICE for a webcam that arrived completely broken. I want a FULL REFUND IMMEDIATELY or I'm reporting you to consumer court and posting on social media.

hard.subject: Absolute scam - product never delivered, no response for weeks
hard.description: I ordered 3 weeks ago. Nothing arrived. No one is helping me. I've sent 4 emails. This is FRAUD. I will be filing a complaint with the authorities.

hard.subject: Threatening legal action over defective product
hard.description: The keyboard I bought stopped working after 2 days. I am a lawyer and will be taking legal action if this is not resolved TODAY. I want a full refund and compensation.

hard.subject: This is outrageous - refund me NOW or I go to the media
hard.description: My webcam was marked as lost. I need my money back immediately. I have 50K followers and will post about this if not resolved in the next hour.
